title: The Straw Hats Inside a Giant Mystery
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Road, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah.. anyway, look at this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How dare you defile my beloved country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't find any proper loot there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we keep going straight, we'll bust through the mirror on the other side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's the blueprint for the block country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be free if we smash the wall behind it, too!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
